channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-04-11
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: The EBA publishes Decision harmonising reporting of SEPA data by national authorities
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published a Decision harmonising how National Competent Authorities (NCAs) report under the SEPA Regulation. The Decision complements the existing European Commission’s Implementing Regulation which requires all Payment Service Providers (PSPs) to report data on charges for credit transfers and payment accounts, as well as the shares of transactions rejected due to EU sanctions. The Decision streamlines the second step of this reporting process – from the NCAs to the EBA and the European Commission. — Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.

item.title: ESMA publishes latest edition of its newsletter 10/04/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator
item.description: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: The EBA consults on major simplification of supervisory reporting to deliver a simpler, smarter and more proportionate framework
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) is announcing a series of measures to significantly simplify EU supervisory reporting. A public consultation on revised Implementing Technical Standards (ITS) on supervisory reporting and on supervisory benchmarking reporting is open until 10 July 2026, and until 10 May 2026 for IFRS 18-related requirements. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.

item.title: Banques et assurances, le grand ménage de printemps pour alléger la facture : « Retrouver des dizaines d’euros, voire plus, pour redonner un coup de peps à votre pouvoir d’achat » - Sudinfo
